title: Importing large Excel tables with more than 20 columns
excerpt: Hi, Am i right in saying that when I upload an Excel as a new board, there is a limitation to how many columns my Excel/new board can have? I was trying to upload a rather large Excel to Monday.com, was required to choos…

posts.author: Holing (Holing Yip)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Am i right in saying that when I upload an Excel as a new board, there is a limitation to how many columns my Excel/new board can have? I was trying to upload a rather large Excel to Monday.com, was required to choose only 20 columns to upload. Is there any way to
(1) upload Excels with more columns; or
(2) after uploading 20 columns, somehow bulk upload the remaining other columns to the same board?

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml:
Holing:

Am i right in saying that when I upload an Excel as a new board, there is a limitation to how many columns my Excel/new board can have?

Yes. 20 columns, 3,000 rows.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JohnW, @Holing,

If you needed it, you can use integromat to import more than 20 columns. You can check this resource from a colleague:
